description: Direct Supply Permissions (DSP), supplier and shipment rating, return requests and return resolution

stories.title: Issue Direct Supply Permission (DSP)
stories.goal: Issue a DSP once a shipment arrives so the QA team and Inventory team can process, test, and store the shipment correctly.

Linked DSP.description: Linked to an existing Supply Order
Linked DSP.officer_can: Review auto-filled data and add notes only
Linked DSP.rate_field: Auto-filled from PO; non-editable at creation

Independent DSP.description: Not linked to any Supply Order
officer_manually_selects: Products (Category, Brand, Product, Quantity, Unit, Notes)
Independent DSP.return_handling: Re-shipment only; no credit note allowed under any condition

triggers.qa: QA team performs inspection and logs results

constraints.deletion: DSP cannot be deleted after being issued
constraints.creation_prerequisite: Shipment arrival must be confirmed first

stories.title: Supplier & Shipment Rating After QA
stories.goal: Give numeric and written feedback after testing a shipment so the system can recalculate supplier and vendor ratings.

system_updates.shipment_rating: Updated and linked to this DSP
system_updates.vendor_rating: Updated as aggregated average of all shipment ratings

stories.title: Return Request on Problematic Shipment
stories.goal: Raise a return request if issues are found so the defective shipment is properly logged and handled.

purchasing_manager_review.reject: Request closed; logged with audit note

stories.title: Return Resolution - Credit Note or Reshipment
stories.goal: Decide how the vendor compensates for a return so financial balance or resupply is properly tracked.

Credit Note.behavior: Credit balance created in vendor account

Reshipment.process: Replacement goes through receiving + QA testing flow again

alternate_flows.no_resolution_chosen: System blocks closure until resolution is selected
alternate_flows.vendor_fails_to_reship: System escalates to Admin with alert

acceptance_criteria.audit: All actions timestamped and linked to original PO + Return + DSP
